messages.content: post a tweet announcing my new React course — include that it covers hooks, context api, redux toolkit, performance optimization with useMemo and useCallback, testing with jest and react testing library, and deployment to vercel. also say it's 50+ hours with a private discord for $49

arguments.text:
🚀 BIG NEWS — my brand new React course just launched! Here's everything inside:
✅ Hooks & Context API
✅ Redux Toolkit
✅ Performance: useMemo & useCallback
✅ Testing with Jest & React Testing Library
✅ CI/CD & Vercel Deployment
50+ hours of content + private Discord community — all for just $49 at launch! 🔥 Link in bio! #ReactJS #WebDev #LearnToCode #100DaysOfCode
